barRaise.topFinding: Code is healthy and shipping fast, but the canonical surface lags it. A native-3D rework has been live since 2026-05-29 and boot is now 3D-only (v0.97.3), yet the GDD Roadmap has no 3D milestone, the Decisions tab has no locked entry for the 2D-to-3D commitment, CLAUDE.md still primes the project as 2D-iso-on-AStarGrid2D, and the dashboard milestone label matches no GDD milestone. No live bug; the canonical docs and dashboard need to catch up to the code.
